rdataset 1.0.0
  • Reference

get_bin_taxonomy_report

Source: R/RcppExports.R
get_bin_taxonomy_report.Rd

Get the bin classifications of a dataset object

get_bin_taxonomy_report(data, type = "otu")

Arguments

data,

a dataset object

type,

string indicating the type of bin clusters. Default = "otu".

Value

data.frame

Examples


data <- miseq_sop_example()
#> ℹ Added 2425 sequences.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence abundances.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 sequence taxonomies.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 2425 asv bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 63 phylotype bins.
#> ℹ Assigned 19 samples to treatments.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bin taxonomies.
#> ℹ Added 2 resource references.
#> ℹ Assigned 531 otu bin representative sequences.
get_bin_taxonomy_report(data, "otu")
#>          id level                             taxon confidence
#> 1    Otu001     1                          Bacteria        100
#> 2    Otu001     2                   "Bacteroidetes"        100
#> 3    Otu001     3                     "Bacteroidia"        100
